cert.downloadSoonBody: Saving the certificate as an image arrives in the next app update. For now, tap Share to share the news!

first-step.title: First step
first-step.takeaway: Every habit starts with one rep — you took it.

rhythm-3.title: Finding your rhythm
rhythm-3.takeaway: Three days in a row is how momentum is born.

two-weeks-14.title: Two weeks strong
two-weeks-14.takeaway: Two weeks in — the habit is taking root.

resilient-30.title: Resilient
resilient-30.takeaway: A month of showing up — proof you can sustain it.

locked-in.title: Locked in
locked-in.takeaway: At ~21 days a habit locks in. Consistency, not intensity, got you here.

automatic-66.title: Automatic
automatic-66.takeaway: ~66 days is where habits run on their own. It is part of you now.

habit-collector.title: Habit collector
habit-collector.takeaway: Three habits compounding at once — your system is working.

fully-charged.title: Fully charged
fully-charged.takeaway: Your small reps rippled into a maxed-out capacity.

goal-setter.title: Goal setter
goal-setter.takeaway: Naming the dream is step one to landing it as a habit.

dragon-slayer.title: Dragon slayer
dragon-slayer.takeaway: You faced what was stopping you — and moved anyway.

dragon-hunter.title: Dragon hunter
dragon-hunter.takeaway: Ten battles won — beating resistance is becoming your habit.

prepared-mind.title: Prepared mind
prepared-mind.takeaway: Preparing your mind first makes the work easier.

team-player.title: Team player
team-player.takeaway: Shared momentum keeps you going on the hard days.
